title: myrsine robusta
intro: Myrsine robusta, also known as the robust myrsine or the New Zealand matipo, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and other beneficial compounds that provide various health benefits, such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Myrsine robusta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
